student.title: Student Progress
student.description: Represents a student's learning progress, levels, points, custom cards, vocabulary, quiz attempts, and statistics.

completedGroups.description: List of completed vocabulary card group keys

customFlashcards.description: List of custom flashcards created by the student

visitDates.description: Dates the student logged in for streak calculation

extraAdClaimsCount.description: Count of ad claims done today

sync_code.title: Sync Code
sync_code.description: Represents a temporary 6-digit sync code mapping to a student's progress payload.

userId.description: The unique ID of the student who generated the code

challenge.title: Student Challenge
challenge.description: Represents a student join invite challenge with a snapshot image dynamic card.

challengerName.description: Student display name of the challenger

points.description: Points value shown on the challenge card

level.description: English proficiency level of the challenger

snapshotB64.description: Base64 encoded snapshot screenshot of the student's workspace

students/{studentId}.description: User student record by the student document ID (Firebase Auth UID).

sync_codes/{code}.description: Collection of 6-digit temporary codes for transferring progress.

challenges/{challengeId}.description: Challenge cards showing results and scores shared by students.
